triples: An aging patriarch transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant, youngest son.
Intertwining lives of two hitmen, a boxer, and a gangster's wife collide in a violent, kinetic underworld.
A computer hacker learns from mysterious rebels about the true nature of his reality and his role.
A young farm boy joins a galactic rebellion to destroy a planet-killing space station and find destiny.
Sentient plastic toys experience an existential crisis when a flashy new space ranger threatens their established hierarchy.
Isolation drives a winter caretaker into a madness fueled by the malevolent spirits of a secluded hotel.
An insomniac office worker and a soap salesman create an underground organization to escape consumerist boredom.
A kind-hearted man with a low IQ inadvertently influences several historic events over several decades.
An adventurous archaeologist races against sinister forces to recover a powerful biblical artifact hidden in Egypt.
A teenager accidentally travels back to the fifties and must ensure his high school parents fall in love.
A secretary on the run checks into a remote motel managed by a quiet young man.
A cynical American nightclub owner in Morocco must decide whether to help his former lover and her husband.
Soldiers embark on a perilous mission through war-torn France to bring home a paratrooper whose brothers died.
During the Vietnam War, a captain travels upriver into the jungle to assassinate a renegade army colonel.
Two musicians witness a mob hit and flee the city disguised as women in an all-female band.
A weary officer hunts down bioengineered beings in a rain-soaked, neon-lit futuristic version of Los Angeles.
A young man rises through the ranks of the New York mafia before his life unravels into paranoia.
Two young lovers from different social classes find passion aboard an ill-fated luxury ocean liner.
Paleontologists must survive a remote theme park after cloned prehistoric creatures escape their enclosures.
An FBI trainee seeks the advice of an incarcerated cannibalistic psychiatrist to catch a serial killer.
A British lieutenant unites warring Arab tribes against the Ottoman Empire during the First World War.
A sadistic gang leader undergoes a controversial conditioning experiment to cure his taste for extreme violence.
A young man navigates the heroin scene of Edinburgh while desperately trying to clean up his life.
King Arthur and his knights search for the sacred chalice while encountering absurd obstacles and strange characters.
A lazy electronics salesman decides to change his life while fighting off a sudden zombie apocalypse.
The future King of England struggles to overcome a debilitating stammer with the help of an unorthodox therapist.
James Bond must track down and destroy a threat to MI6 as his past returns to haunt him.
Unscrupulous boxing promoters, violent bookmakers, and a Russian gangster search for a priceless stolen diamond.
In a futuristic city, the son of the wealthy planner falls for a working-class prophet.
Criminals and police hunt a child killer whose presence has disrupted the city's illegal operations.
A secret police agent monitoring a playwright in East Berlin becomes increasingly absorbed by his targets' lives.
The crew of a German U-boat faces claustrophobia and terror during an arduous mission in the Atlantic.
A terrifying vampire brings a plague and dark shadows to an unsuspecting harbor town.
Inside an underground bunker, the final days of the Nazi regime crumble as Soviet forces surround Berlin.
A young man hides the fall of the Berlin Wall from his frail, socialist mother to avoid shock.
A ruthless conquistador leads a doomed expedition through the Amazon jungle in search of a golden city.
A misunderstood Parisian boy escapes his neglectful family and harsh teachers through small acts of rebellion.
A small-time thief on the run from the police falls in love with an American journalism student.
A silent film star's career fades while a young dancer's fame rises during the arrival of sound.
A professional hitman reluctantly takes in a young girl after her family is murdered by corrupt agents.
Three young men from marginalized backgrounds wander through the Paris suburbs following a violent riot.
An unlikely friendship develops between a wealthy quadriplegic and a man from the projects hired to assist him.
A female painter falls for the aristocrat she is secretly commissioned to paint in eighteenth-century Brittany.
A celebratory dance rehearsal descends into a hallucinatory nightmare after a bowl of sangria is spiked.
Three gunslingers compete during the American Civil War to find a hidden cache of Confederate gold.
A young boy forms a deep bond with a projectionist in a small Sicilian village cinema.
A struggling filmmaker retreats into memories and fantasies while attempting to finish his latest production.
A desperate father and his son search the streets of Rome for a stolen essential bicycle.
A journalist wanders through the hedonistic and glamorous high society of Rome over several nights.
An American ballet student discovers a sinister, supernatural conspiracy at a prestigious German dance academy.
An aging socialite reflects on his empty life and lost love while wandering through Roman ruins.
A petty criminal attempts to survive a German concentration camp through any means necessary.
A linguist races against time to communicate with extraterrestrial visitors before global tensions explode.
A widowed mother struggles with her violent son until a mysterious neighbor brings hope.
A sleazy cable executive discovers a broadcast signal that causes hallucinations and physical mutations.
Friends and former lovers reunite to support a dying professor during his final days.
A midwife uncovers evidence against the Russian mafia while investigating the death of a young girl.
A disillusioned knight challenges Death to a chess match while returning from the Crusades.
Four high school teachers test a theory that maintaining constant intoxication improves their lives.
A young woman navigates the complexities of her love life and career over four years.
A Syrian refugee seeking asylum in Helsinki crosses paths with a grumpy traveling salesman.
A childless couple in rural Iceland discovers a mysterious newborn on their remote sheep farm.
Greed and class discrimination threaten the symbiotic relationship between a wealthy family and their servants.
A man seeks revenge after being kidnapped and imprisoned for fifteen years without explanation.
Two detectives struggle to solve the mystery of South Korea's first confirmed serial killer.
Passengers fight for survival on a high-speed train during a sudden, nationwide zombie outbreak.
A handmaid is hired to swindle a Japanese heiress but ends up falling for her.
Masterless warriors defend a vulnerable village against ruthless bandits seeking to steal their harvest.
A young girl enters a magical realm of spirits and must work to free her parents.
Four witnesses tell conflicting accounts of a crime, challenging the nature of truth and human memory.
In Neo-Tokyo, a biker gang member gains destructive psychic powers, threatening to trigger a global apocalypse.
A journalist investigates a cursed videotape that seemingly kills anyone exactly seven days after watching it.
Villagers in colonial India challenge their British oppressors to a cricket match to avoid crushing taxes.
A young man learns of his royal heritage and leads a war to reclaim his kingdom.
A common man becomes a feared underworld don in Mumbai after witnessing police brutality and corruption.
A psychiatrist is summoned to investigate supernatural occurrences in a family's ancestral home with a dark history.
Two young Indians living abroad fall in love during a trip, but face strict traditional family values.
A young stepdaughter of a sadistic army officer escapes into an eerie but captivating fantasy world.
A brilliant plastic surgeon develops a resilient synthetic skin while keeping a mysterious woman captive.
Three generations of women survive wind, fire, and even death in a small Spanish town.
A television reporter and her cameraman are trapped inside a building where a terrifying infection spreads.
A distraught actress encounters a series of eccentric characters while trying to contact her vanished lover.
A horrific car accident connects three stories involving loss, regret, and the harsh realities of Mexico City.
Two teenagers and an older woman embark on a road trip across Mexico, exploring love and maturity.
A domestic worker in a middle-class Mexico City neighborhood navigates personal turmoil and political unrest.
An antique dealer discovers an ancient device that grants eternal life but at a terrifying cost.
A poor woodcutter makes a deal with Death to finally enjoy a full meal for himself.
Two boys growing up in a violent Rio slum choose different paths as crime consumes their neighborhood.
An embittered letter-writer accompanies a young boy across Brazil to find the father he never knew.
A captain of an elite police squad must find a substitute while battling rampant corruption and gangs.
The Greek myth of Orpheus and Eurydice is reimagined during the vibrant, colorful Carnival in Rio.
A live-in housekeeper's life is disrupted when her estranged daughter arrives and challenges social hierarchies.
A retired legal counselor writes a novel about an unsolved rape and murder case from his past.
Six short stories explore the extremities of human behavior when pushed toward vengeance and total loss of control.
A woman begins to suspect that her adopted daughter might be the child of political prisoners.
Two small-time con artists team up to sell a set of rare counterfeit stamps to a businessman.
Survivors race across a desert wasteland to escape a tyrant in a high-octane pursuit for survival.
A socially awkward woman obsessed with ABBA music dreams of a glamorous wedding to escape her dull life.
A widowed mother and her son are haunted by a sinister presence from a mysterious pop-up book.
A seventeen-year-old boy navigates survival within his explosive and criminal family in the suburbs of Melbourne.
An undercover cop and a mole in the police force attempt to identify each other within the mob.
Reporters scramble to uncover the meaning of a publishing tycoon's dying word through the eyes of his associates.
